headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin to control a Sleep Number SleepIQ bed and foundation. All accessories are auto-detected from your account.
footerDisplay: For help or to report issues, visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/dppeak/homebridge-sleepiq).

email.title: Email
email.description: Your Sleep Number account email address.

refreshTime.title: Refresh Time (seconds)
refreshTime.description: How often to poll SleepIQ for updates. There is little benefit setting this below 5 seconds.

sendDelay.title: Send Delay (seconds)
sendDelay.description: Debounce delay before sending a new sleep number to the bed after adjusting the slider in HomeKit.

warmingTimer.title: Foot Warming Timer
warmingTimer.description: How long the foot warmer runs when turned on. Only used when foot warmers are enabled.

enableOccupancySensors.title: Enable Occupancy Sensors
enableOccupancySensors.description: Create occupancy sensors for each bed side, plus virtual anySide and bothSides sensors.

enableSleepNumberControls.title: Enable Sleep Number Controls
enableSleepNumberControls.description: Create a dimmer-style control for each side to adjust the sleep number (firmness).

enablePrivacySwitch.title: Enable Privacy Switch
enablePrivacySwitch.description: Create a switch to toggle the bed's privacy/pause mode (stops data transmission to Sleep Number).

enableFoundationControls.title: Enable Foundation Controls
enableFoundationControls.description: Create head and foot position controls for each side of a FlexFit foundation.

enableOutlets.title: Enable Foundation Outlets
enableOutlets.description: Create outlet switches for compatible FlexFit foundations.

enableLightstrips.title: Enable Foundation Lightstrips
enableLightstrips.description: Create under-bed lightstrip controls for compatible FlexFit foundations.

enableFootWarmers.title: Enable Foot Warmers
enableFootWarmers.description: Create foot warmer controls for FlexFit 3 foundations.
